data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence regarding the management of versioned waivers or the re-signing process. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to this requirement leads to an inconclusive result, as there is no direct evidence confirming or denying the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of versioned waiver templates being created, managed, or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-sign requirement when form version changes.
